title: deinandra mohavensis
intro: Deinandra mohavensis, also known as desert chicory, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the deserts of southwestern North America. The medicinal properties of Deinandra mohavensis include its ability to act as a laxative and a diuretic, and it has been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce pain and swelling, and its ability to promote digestive health. Deinandra mohavensis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and it is often used in herbal medicine to treat a range of ailments.
